title: ocotea santamartae
intro: Ocotea santamartae, also known as Colombian sandalwood, is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae, native to the Andean region of Colombia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ocotea santamartae are said to include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Ocotea santamartae can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oil, capsules, and teas, which can be used to promote overall well-being and relaxation.
